title: Resolve, Regarding Legislative Review of Chapter 201: Employer Reporting and Payments, a Major Substantive Rule of the Maine Public Employees Retirement System
last_house_action: 5/6/2025 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 6/25/2025 - On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table FINALLY PASSED in concurrence.

actions.description: Reported by Representative ROEDER for the Maine Public Employees Retirement System pursuant to the Maine Revised Statutes, Title 5, section 8072. Received by the Clerk of the House on January 6, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative ROEDER of Bangor, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Resolve was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-71) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Resolve was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-71) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports Read On motion by Senator TIPPING of Penobscot the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE by Committee Amendment "A" (H-71) READ and ADOPTED Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-71) in concurrence
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending FINAL PASSAGE in concurrence
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table FINALLY PASSED in concurrence.
